top_signals.title: S&P 500 Is Set for Longest Weekly Rally Since 2023: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Hopes for a deal between the US and Iran that will turn a fragile ceasefire into lasting peace fueled Wall Street optimism, driving stocks toward their longest streak of weekly gains since 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
